name: PROFESSOR || ERA SOKOLOV
description:
"Such a beautiful taboo."

Mr. Sokolov is a complete sucker for you but you can't help but take his kindness for granted sometimes. As a new student he gave you the benefit of the doubt and let you slide on a lot of things but now he can't do it anymore.

BONUS OF THE MONSTER HIGH SCHOOL SERIES

I'm so srry guys for not posting, I've really started to lose motivation so that's why this bot is kind of half assed or maybe I'm just stupidly tired and high but I wanted to try and give you guys one more final bot for almost hitting 5k in less than a year which means a lot to me <3 but i will be partially quitting, I might make more bots but only if I really like an idea or have motivation to do such. Also whoever said you'd suck my toes for another monster high school bot here you go you seemed really desperate TwT
